products.title: English Willow Cricket Bat
products.description: Grade 1 English willow bat with a lightweight handle, big sweet spot, and a pro-level finish for serious run-scorers.

products.title: Leather Cricket Ball - Red
products.description: Hand-stitched, four-piece leather cricket ball built for durability and consistent seam movement in match play.

products.title: Pro Batting Gloves
products.description: Multi-layer foam padding with a snug pittard palm for maximum grip and protection against fast bowling.

products.title: Cricket Batting Leg Pads
products.description: Lightweight cane-and-foam leg guards offering full knee-roll protection without slowing your footwork.

products.title: Titanium Grille Batting Helmet
products.description: Adjustable dial-fit helmet with a titanium grille, meeting international safety standards for batting and keeping.

products.title: Cricket Kit Duffle Bag
products.description: Spacious wheelie kit bag with dedicated bat compartment, shoe pocket, and heavy-duty zips for match-day travel.

products.title: Match Football - Size 5
products.description: FIFA-quality thermally bonded match ball with a textured surface for accurate flight and consistent touch.

products.title: Firm Ground Football Boots
products.description: Lightweight synthetic upper with conical firm-ground studs for sharp acceleration and precise cutting on natural turf.

products.title: Home Kit Football Jersey
products.description: Breathable moisture-wicking jersey with a modern athletic fit, built to keep you cool through 90 minutes.

products.title: Pro Level Shin Guards
products.description: Ergonomic shin guards with ventilated ankle protection and an adjustable strap for a locked-in, low-profile fit.

products.title: Goalkeeper Gloves - Grip Pro
products.description: Latex palm gloves with reinforced finger spines for extra grip and protection on every save.

products.title: Training Cones Set (20 pcs)
products.description: Stackable agility cones for dribbling drills, passing lanes, and match-day warm-ups, built to last a full season.
